global.title: Solid-state batteries are now powering EVs in the real world
global.summary: Solid-state EV batteries are now being tested on the road in North America for the first time, promising longer range, faster charging, and lower costs.

global.title: The Chevy Equinox EV is suddenly way more expensive to lease at over $500 a month
global.summary: America’s most affordable EV offering over 315 miles of range, as GM calls it, just got way more expensive to lease this month.

global.title: Gummys go green as HARIBO turns to electric semi trucks
global.summary: Iconic gummy candy brand HARIBO and its transport partners at Recht Logistik are turning to electric semi trucks to deliver emissions-free shipping across several of its European operations.

global.title: Georgia is about to have the biggest solar cell factory in US history
global.summary: Solar giant Qcells has started making solar cells at its Cartersville, Georgia, factory, and it’s on track to become the largest solar cell factory in US history by Q3 2026.

global.title: A huge Arkansas solar + storage project locks in $3.5B in financing
global.summary: Cypress Creek Energy has reached a big milestone in Arkansas for one of the largest solar-plus-storage projects in the US.

global.title: BYD’s luxury EV roadster leaks with a tri-motor 1,500+ hp setup, and it’s headed overseas
global.summary: BYD is about to go head-to-head with Europe’s top luxury brands. Ahead of its official launch next month, new details reveal that the Denza Z roadster will feature a tri-motor setup, delivering a ridiculous 1,528 hp combined.

global.title: Bluetti exclusive Early Prime Day Elite 200 V2 power station $759, Navee G5 Max e-scooter $650 low, EGO electric mini bike, more
global.summary: At the front of our Thursday Green Deals is the Early Prime Day Sale from Bluetti that benefits from two exclusive bonus savings codes for our readers, with offers like the 2,074Wh Elite 200 V2 Portable Power Station down at $759, among many others. We may not be seeing a simultaneous flash sale the

global.title: Waymo launches $30/month ‘Premier’ membership with priority pickups and cashback
global.summary: Waymo is launching its first-ever membership program, “Waymo Premier,” offering its most frequent riders priority pickups, 10% cashback, and early access to new cities for $29.99 per month. The invite-only program marks a significant step in Waymo’s effort to build rider loyalty as it scales toward

global.title: Tesla promotes FSD misuse in its own videos — undermining its legal defense
global.summary: Tesla is facing up to $14.5 billion in lawsuits related to its “Full Self-Driving” and Autopilot systems — and the company’s own marketing department keeps making the problem worse. In two official promotional videos published in the last three weeks, Tesla showed a driver making espresso while FSD

global.title: BYD’s ‘Super’ hatch goes on sale with 65 miles of EV range for under $22,000
global.summary: The Dolphin G DM-i is BYD’s first car specifically designed for Europe. With up to 65 miles of pure electric range and 646 miles combined, BYD said the plug-in hatch will redefine the segment as an affordable, efficient alternative. It’s now available to order, starting at under $22,000.
